• Protonstars153 - Markdown editor with live preview.
• prerender_railsstars353 - Rails middleware gem for prerendering javascript-rendered pages on the fly for SEO.
• PHPBenchstars1.6k - A benchmarking Framework.
• OCaml OpenFlowstars13 - A serialization and protocol library for OpenFlow.
• Pyretic - Pyretic is one member of the Frenetic family of SDN programming languages.
• FlowVisorstars157 - An OpenFlow controller that acts as a hypervisor/proxy between a switch and multiple controllers. Can slice multiple switches in parallel, effectively slicing a network.
• OpenVirtexstars85 - A network hypervisor that can create multiple virtual and programmable networks on top of a single physical infrastructure.
• snabbswitchstars2.9k - An open source virtualized Ethernet networking stack.
• OpenSDNCore - Virtualisation Testbed for NFV/SDN Environment.
• nice-of - A tool to test OpenFlow controller application for the NOX controller platform.
• Open MUL - A lightweight SDN/Openflow controller written almost entirely in C from scratch.
• Official site
• LINC-Switchstars211 - A pure OpenFlow software switch written in Erlang
• CPqDstars283- An OpenFlow 1.3 compatible user-space software switch implementation
• Lagopus - A high-performance software OpenFlow 1.3 switch.
• OVSDB - A communication protocol which used to manage the OpenvSwitch database.
• loxigenstars96 - LoxiGen is a tool that generates OpenFlow protocol libraries for a number of languages.
• glumpystars1k - OpenGL scientific visualizations library.
• glumpystars1.1k - OpenGL scientific visualizations library.
• P4 - A declarative language for expressing how packets are processed by the pipeline of a network forwarding element such as a switch, NIC, router or network function appliance.
• EstiNet - A world-renowned software tool for network planning
• NodeFlowstars58 - An OpenFlow Controller Node Style.
• OpenFlow - A communications protocol that gives access to the forwarding plane of a network switch or router over the network.

• DWTstars133 - A library for creating cross-platform GUI applications. GWT is a port of the Java SWT library to D. DWT was promoted as a semi-standard GUI library for D, but unfortunately didn't catch up popularity yet.
• dqmlstars35 - Qt Qml bindings for the D programming language.

• DLangUIstars698 - Cross Platform GUI for D programming language. My personal favorate, because it is written in D(not a binding), and is cross platform. DLangUI also has a good showcase in the IDE DLangIDEstars403.
• enmstars120 - enm is an Erlang port driver that wraps the nanomsg C library.
• minmaxliststars4 - Elixir library extending Enum.min_by/2, Enum.max_by/2 and Enum.min_max_by/2 to return a list of results instead of just one.
• Dtanksstars11 - Robot Tank Battle Game.
